scripts.wireviz:modules: for m in main-loom front-clip dashboard rear-boot switch-cluster; do tsx scripts/gen-wireviz-module.ts $m && .venv/bin/wireviz harness/mod-$m.yml -f s && cp harness/mod-$m.svg public/diagrams/; done
scripts.diagrams:dot: for m in main-loom front-clip dashboard rear-boot switch-cluster; do tsx scripts/gen-dot-module.ts $m && dot -Tsvg harness/dot-$m.dot -o public/diagrams/dot-$m.svg; done
